emails.subject: CERA/UCLA Anderson report
emails.body: CERA/UCLA Anderson report Jeff: CERA just informed me that as a CERA member, we will receive one copy of this report. He will forward me a copy in the next day or so. I know you are interested in it, and will get you a copy as soon as I receive it. Jennifer

emails.subject: RE: CERA/UCLA Anderson report
emails.body: RE: CERA/UCLA Anderson report Great job on the Dunn letter, by the way! To: Thome, Jennifer

emails.subject: RE: CERA/UCLA Anderson report

emails.subject: RE: CERA/UCLA Anderson report
emails.body: thanks. and i apologize profusely for having excluded you from the list. it was, as you can imagine (having worked together on these fire drills together in the past), it was not pretty---process wise. Jennifer Thome/ENRON@enronXgate 07/11/2001 04:12 PM

emails.subject: RE: CERA/UCLA Anderson report

emails.subject: RE: CERA/UCLA Anderson report
emails.body: No problem I can only imagine the process! I have been up to my ears in DWR contracts anyways.
